description: An EHS specialist is conducting a planned audit of a production area to ensure all employees are using the correct Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the PPE requirements for the specified production area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the requirements are: hard hat, safety glasses, steel-toed boots, and chemical-resistant gloves.

nodes.task_description: Observe employees in the area and note any non-compliance on an audit form.

expected_outcome.value: Agent observes 10 employees and notes one is not wearing safety glasses.

nodes.task_description: Finalize the audit report and assign a corrective action to the area supervisor to address the finding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the final audit report and creates a CAPA for the supervisor.
